Comment:
I booked a table Amanora Coffee Island for 12:30 afternoon.
Only coffee was available. I was told that food will be available only after 3:00 pm. Waste of my time.

Nice place to relax with good coffee and food. Visited Coffee Island recently and had a really pleasant experience. The place has a nice, relaxed vibe and comfortable seating, perfect for sitting back and enjoying a coffee without feeling rushed.

We tried a few drinks and food items. The coffee was smooth and well made, not too bitter and not overly sweet. The hot chocolate / creamy drinks were comforting and nicely balanced. The pancakes were soft and fluffy, just the right amount of sweetness. We also had a rice bowl, which was filling and tasted fresh — good portion size as well.

Service was quick and staff were polite. The place was clean and well maintained, even when it was busy. Overall, Coffee Island is a good spot if you’re looking for decent coffee, light meals, and a calm place to spend some time. Would definitely visit again.

P.S.:- Don't forget to download there apps and collect leafs

Bobastic coffeeccino - 7/10
Puff - (it came cold and tasted hard and stale. They reheated it. But still wasn’t as expected)- 5/10

Comment:
Ordered Roasted whole bean Kenyan and Ethiopian coffee.
Pros:
Good quality beans.
Reasonably priced

Cons:
5 month old batch roasts (lost freshness post 1month - can feel it)
Darker roasts are only available.

Final Conclusion:
Many Indian roaster have better SOPs and produce better tasting coffee with less premium beans.
Reply: Thank you for sharing your thoughtful feedback. We’re glad you found the quality and pricing of our beans to your liking. Your observations about roast freshness and profiles have been noted and shared with our roasting team. We’re continuously working to refine our processes to ensure every single-origin bean reflects its true character at peak freshness. Insights like yours help us evolve and enhance the coffee experience we aim to deliver.
Staff Mentioned: Cons, Darker, Ethiopian, Final Conclusion, Kenyan, Many Indian, Ordered Roasted, Pros, Reasonably

Coffee Island is an absolute gem for coffee and food lovers. The food is nothing short of amazing, with every dish crafted to perfection, delighting the taste buds. The Vietnamese coffee is a standout – rich, flavorful, and a must-try for anyone visiting.

The ambiance is superb, offering a perfect mix of coziness and elegance. Whether you're there to work, relax, or catch up with friends, it’s the ideal spot.

Special thanks to Suraj and Farhan for their exceptional service! They were attentive, friendly, and went the extra mile to ensure everything was perfect. Their warm hospitality truly enhanced the overall experience.

Coffee Island isn’t just a café; it’s an experience. Highly recommended for anyone who loves great food, incredible coffee.

Comment:
It was my first time visiting Coffee Island, and I must say I was pleasantly surprised by the entire experience. I ordered the herb chicken open puff along with a nitro bubble brew, and both were absolutely delightful. The coffee was rich and smooth, and the puff was fresh, flavorful, and perfectly baked.
What really stood out was the warm and welcoming service — since it was my first order, the staff even gave me a 10% discount, which was such a thoughtful gesture. The place was spotless, with excellent upkeep, and the ambiance made it a perfect spot to relax and enjoy my coffee.
Overall, I had a wonderful time at Coffee Island and truly appreciated the combination of great coffee, tasty food, friendly service, and a clean, inviting atmosphere. Will surely be visiting again soon!

2. The items that did arrive were far below our expectations. The chicken bites were burnt, and the island pour-over coffee did not match the menu photo (the menu shows it should be served in a glass with a paper filter on top).

3. The dining area was filled with smoke, causing our eyes to sting, and our clothes ended up smelling of smoke as well.

Thank you for the service. However, this unpleasant experience is more than enough for us. We will not be returning at any time in the future.

The atmosphere & location of the cafe is great! Food is good too, however I had terrible experience with the service, my order was taken wrong and then when asked for menu I was handed the bill, later ordered something else too and informed two different servers and waited another 15-20 mins but didn’t get my other order.

The service and staff’s order management can be improved, it’s something that cannot be neglected at such a location. It seems like the staff is untrained.

Would not recommend or come again.

☕ Coffee Island – Churchgate (Cambata Building) Review

📍 Coffee Island, Shop No. 10/11, Ground Floor, Eros Cinema, 42, Maharshi Karve Rd, Churchgate, Mumbai – Open 24×7

If you’re near Churchgate in Mumbai and searching for a coffee spot that’s perfect for chilling, working, meetings, or just unwinding, Coffee Island is absolutely worth adding to your list!

⸻

🌟 Ambiance & Vibe

Coffee Island Churchgate stands out for its comfortable and inviting vibes.
✔️ Spacious indoor seating with good lighting
✔️ Cozy corners ideal for work, meetups, or relaxed coffee sessions
✔️ Calm yet energetic atmosphere, perfect for day or night
✔️ Open 24×7 — a huge bonus for college students, freelancers, and late-night coffee lovers

This outlet fits both aesthetic cafe vibes and functional work-friendly space — great for conversations, reviews, or even casual catch-ups.

⸻

☕ What You Tried & Loved

Must-Try Drinks
✨ Spanish Bombon Coffee — Rich, sweet, and beautifully layered
🔥 Hot Latte (Signature) — Smooth and perfectly balanced
🥥 BobaStick Coconut Matcha — A refreshing twist with chewy boba — a definite crowd-pleaser!

Coffee Island has been gaining popularity across India for its coffee + boba fusion drinks — blending classic espresso culture with trendy textures and flavors like matcha + boba. This creative range makes the brand especially known for indulgent coffee boba experiences that coffee lovers and bubble tea fans both enjoy.

⸻

🍽️ Food You Enjoyed

🍁 Classic Maple Pancake — Fluffy, warm, and satisfying
🌶️ Chicken Jalapeño Flatbread — A spicy & cheesy favorite
🧀 Three Cheese & Mac Cheese — Comfort food at its best
🍝 Spaghetti Aglio Olio — Simple, tasty, and perfectly executed

The food menu here is a great complement to the beverage offerings — from brunch-friendly items to hearty mains.

⸻

⭐ Overall Experience

🟡 10/10 — From service to management, everything was top-notch
🟡 Staff was welcoming and attentive
🟡 Great for long chats, laptop work, meetings, and casual hangouts
🟡 A must-visit spot if you’re in Churchgate

⸻

📌 Why This Outlet Stands Out
•	Open 24×7 — Unlike most cafes, this one never sleeps!
•	Coffee + Boba Specialization — One of the go-to places in Mumbai to try coffee boba fusion drinks.

Comment:
Visited this 24hr open cafe recently and had a mixed review. For a cafe which boosts itself to be open 24 hrs was out of food at 1.30am on a Saturday night! Don’t know what kind of business are they expecting to run with a lot of food items being unavailable. Some of the people in our group were Jains and except for the butter croissant, there was nothing they could eat.
The cafe interiors are decent.
Now to the food and drinks we had -
1. Roasted tomato & bocconcini croissant - The taste was really nice. Would surely have this again.
2. French butter croissant - It was very dry and not buttery enough making it difficult to eat.
3. Islander cold coffee - It was flavourful and delicious! One of the best I’ve had till date.
4. Americano - The coffee was rich in flavour. If you are a black coffee person, you will surely enjoy it.
5. Berry burst paradise milkshake - Avoid having the milkshakes here. It was just vanilla ice cream with a ting of strawberry essence. It felt very artificial.

All in all, their coffees are really worth having but they really need to improve their food scene if they want to sustain at this location.
Reply: Thank you for sharing your detailed review. We're glad the coffee and a few dishes stood out for you. Your feedback on late-night availability and menu consistency has been shared with the team as we work on refining the overall experience.
